basic_details.job_title: NIT Tiruchirappalli Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology, Tiruchirappalli (NIT Tiruchirappalli) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 2 Project Associate-I / Project Associate-II Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply Online through the official NIT Tiruchirappalli website. The last date to submit the application form is 25-06-2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age relaxation will be provided as per Government of India norms.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E/B.Tech in CSE/IT or equivalent, Preferable M.E/M.Tech in CSE/IT or equivalent, Minimum 60% or 6.5 CGPA in UG and PG
qualification.details: Project Associate-I: B.E/B.Tech in CSE/IT or equivalent with preferable M.E/M.Tech in CSE/IT or equivalent. Minimum 60% or 6.5 CGPA in UG and PG from a recognized University/ Institute. Project Associate-II: B.E/B.Tech in CSE/IT or equivalent with preferable M.E/M.Tech in CSE/IT or equivalent with 2 years experience. Minimum 60% or 6.5 CGPA in UG and PG from a recognized University/ Institute.

salary_details.details: Project Associate-I: Rs. 25,000 (Consolidated) Project Associate-II: Rs. 35,000 (Consolidated)

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NIT Tiruchirappalli Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 25-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NIT Tiruchirappalli to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIT Tiruchirappalli recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the Project Associate-I and Project Associate-II posts is 25th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for these posts?
faq.answer: Candidates need a B.E/B.Tech in CSE/IT or equivalent. A preference is given to those with M.E/M.Tech in CSE/IT or equivalent, and a minimum of 60% or 6.5 CGPA in UG and PG is mandatory.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Associate positions?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for both Project Associate-I and Project Associate-II posts is 35 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per Government of India norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for these positions?
faq.answer: The consolidated salary for Project Associate-I is Rs. 25,000 per month, and for Project Associate-II, it is Rs. 35,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies, with one post for Project Associate-I and one post for Project Associate-II.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is entirely online. Candidates must apply through the official NIT Tiruchirappalli website.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process may involve a written test, if deemed necessary, followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where is NIT Tiruchirappalli located?
faq.answer: National Institute of Technology, Tiruchirappalli is located in Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, with the pincode 620015.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: These are contractual positions at the National Institute of Technology, Tiruchirappalli.
